commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh A false witness shall not be unpunished, and he that speaks lies shall not escape. Augustine of Hippo There are true martyrs and false ones, because there are true and false witnesses. But Scripture says, “The false witness shall not go unpunished. ” If the false witness will not escape punishment, neither will the true witness be denied a crown. And it was, indeed, easy to bear witness to the Lord Jesus Christ and the truth, because he is God; but to do so to the death, that was a great work.
